title: Tempest (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tempest''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Tempest]]s''', the largest divisions of the [[Nihil]]
*'''[[Tempest Force]]''', an [[Imperial Army]] unit
*The '''[[H-60 Tempest bomber]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''''[[Tempest (starship)|Tempest]]''''', a spaceship built by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]]
*The '''[[Tempest-class gunship|''Tempest''-class gunship]]''', a small attack craft
*The '''''[[Tempest (Victory-class)|Tempest]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*The '''[[H-60 Tempest bomber/Legends|H-60 Tempest bomber]]'''
*'''[[Tempest (spice)|Tempest]]''', a [[Spice/Legends|spice]]
*'''[[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]''', an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] unit

==Real world==
*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''''', a [[2006]] novel
*'''''[[Tempest Feud]]''''', an RPG supplement
*'''Tempest''', a ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' server

==See also==
*[[Tempest Runner (disambiguation)]]
*[[Tempest Breaker (disambiguation)]]

{{Disambig}}
